official_sources.evidence: Gemini developer documentation exposes derivatives REST endpoints for perpetual contracts and derivatives-specific account operations.

runtime_isolation: Gemini derivatives/perpetual access requires region and product eligibility checks and must not be enabled through the spot order runtime.
unsupported_runtime_reason: Gemini derivatives/perpetual endpoints are official, but this adapter has no region/product guard, derivatives symbol model, position/risk parser or derivatives order reconciliation.
required_auth_and_scope: derivatives read-only and trade permission guard
remaining_work: pin derivatives symbol and market metadata specs
add derivatives account, position, order and fill parsers
